title: moraea albiflora
intro: Moraea albiflora, also known as the white-flowered Cape sugarbush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Moraea albiflora include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. Moraea albiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use.
